1: Sit thou at my right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool.
2: Rule thou in the midst of thine enemies.
3: In the beauties of holiness from the womb of the morning: Thou hast the dew of thy youth.
4: Thou art art a priest for ever after the order of Melchizedek.
5: Shall strike through kings in the day of his wrath.
6: He shall wound the heads over many countries.
7: Therefore shall he lift up the head.
